name: zeb/deckgl
description: Deck.gl 9.x runtime for geospatial and large-scale data visualisation. Fully offline — @deck.gl/core + layers + aggregation + geo + mesh + extensions bundled inline. 25+ layer types, tooltip, utilities (haversine, bearing, colorRamp, animation).

full-9.x.note: Bundles @deck.gl/core + layers + aggregation-layers + geo-layers + mesh-layers + extensions via esbuild. Build: cd /tmp/zeb-deckgl-build && npm install && node_modules/.bin/esbuild entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=deckgl.bundle.mjs
